title: aetheolaena doryphylla
intro: Aetheolaena doryphylla, also known as Kalaunghat or the Indian mayapple, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Aetheolaena doryphylla include its ability to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
